summary: Iteration 19 - Version 2.2.0 Multi-Broker Support Testing Complete. All 23 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed. Fixed 1 minor issue: MarketTicker.js still had 'UPSTOX NOT CONNECTED' instead of generic 'BROKER NOT CONNECTED'.

issues: 404 error for favicon - not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: broker_manager.py correctly implements multi-broker support with 6 brokers
trading_engine.py correctly maps MCX exchange for order placement
All Upstox-specific references have been replaced with generic Broker references
SettingsPanel.js dynamically shows active broker name in labels
MarketTicker.js now shows 'BROKER NOT CONNECTED' (fixed during testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Version 2.2.0 multi-broker support fully tested and working. All 6 brokers (Upstox, Zerodha, Angel One, 5paisa, Paytm Money, IIFL) accessible via /api/brokers/list with descriptions. Broker switching works via POST /api/brokers/set-active. All broker operations routed through active broker. MCX auto-trade support tested with option chains for CRUDEOIL, GOLD, SILVER returning correct exchange mapping. Frontend shows dynamic broker labels and 'BROKER NOT CONNECTED' badges.

brokers_list_api.result: Returns 6 brokers with id, name, description fields

broker_auth_url_api.result: Returns auth URL for active broker

broker_connection_api.result: Returns {connected: false, message} when not logged in

broker_set_active_api.result: Switches active broker successfully, returns {status: success, active_broker}

broker_profile_api.result: Returns error when not logged in (expected behavior)

broker_portfolio_api.result: Returns error when not logged in (expected behavior)

broker_orders_api.result: Returns error/empty orders when not logged in (expected behavior)

mcx_option_chain_api.result: Returns MCX crude oil option chain with correct exchange mapping

market_status_api.result: Returns both NSE and MCX status

frontend_settings_broker_grid.result: Shows 6 broker selection cards with names and descriptions

frontend_settings_dynamic_labels.result: Labels show active broker name dynamically (e.g., 'Upstox Connection', 'Upstox API Credentials')

frontend_market_ticker_mcx.result: Shows CRUDE OIL, GOLD, SILVER with values

frontend_risk_panel_broker_badge.result: Shows 'BROKER NOT CONNECTED' instead of 'UPSTOX NOT CONNECTED'

frontend_market_ticker_broker_badge.result: Fixed to show 'BROKER NOT CONNECTED' instead of 'UPSTOX NOT CONNECTED'

mocked_apis_note: Option chain data is SIMULATED (Black-Scholes) when no broker connected - this is expected behavior for paper trading mode.

bug_fixed.issue: Still showing 'UPSTOX NOT CONNECTED' instead of generic 'BROKER NOT CONNECTED'
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed line 40 to use 'BROKER NOT CONNECTED'
